title: aphora orbicularis
intro: Aphora orbicularis is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family of plants commonly known as "moonwort" or "moon carrot." The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aphora orbicularis include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in humans.
